question: Does the venture capital firm currently funding the owner of ExoAnalytic Solutions have a co-founder who created the Mosaic web browser?

chain.fact: Anduril owns ExoAnalytic Solutions and is raising funding from Andreessen Horowitz.
Andreessen Horowitz was co-founded by Marc Andreessen.
Marc Andreessen co-authored the Mosaic web browser.

article_title: Anduril snaps up space surveillance firm ExoAnalytic Solutions | TechCrunch
event_title: Which companies will be acquired before 2027?
